=== info.txt

===================
===================
Bob Dylan
1992.03.28
Brisbane, Entertainement Center
Queensland, Australia

FLAC files  labelled "Les Kokay Australia 92-1

CD1

1 All Along The Watchtower
2 Most Of The Time
3 Everything Is Broken
4 Just Like A Woman
5 Tangled Up In Blue
6 She Belongs To Me
7 Maggie's Farm
8 Love Minus Zero/No Limit
9 Little Moses (Bert A Williams/Earle C Jones)
10 Two Soldiers (Trad)
11 The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll,

CD2

1 Cat's In The Well
2 Simple Twist Of Fate
3 The Times They Are A-Changin'
4 Highway 61 Revisited
5 Ballad Of A Thin Man
6 Rainy Day Women Nos. 12 & 35
7 Blowin' In The Wind 


8, 9, 18  Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal).
10  Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal) & John Jackson (guitar).
11, 14  acoustic with the band.
4, 5, 8, 11, 13, 14, 18  Bob Dylan harmonica.
5, 11, 14  Bucky Baxter electric mandolin.

BobTalk:
Thanks everybody! This is a little song off that same record that last song was off. (after Most Of The Time).
Thanks everybody! This is my farm song tonight! (before Maggie's Farm).
Thanks everybody! That's the spiritual part of the show. Here's a story about two soldiers.
Here's my invitation for Bonnie .... Bonnie come and play on the song. She says she'd like to .... Let's not be cruel .... This is about one of my favorite highways (trying to get Bonnie Raitt on stage before Highway 61 Revisited).
